description:
Product name: Dual Type-C HUB Seven-in-One HDMI Docking Station

Product model: T-808

Product Color: Classic Silver Space Gray

Interface type: dual Type-C 3.1 high-speed interface

Expansion port: USB3.0 * 2 + USB-C data + USB-C PD charging (compatible with Thunderbolt 3 standard) + HDMI 4K HD

Transmission rate: TYPE-C to USB3.1 theoretical speed 10Gbps, backward compatible with USB3.0 / USB2.0 / USB1.1

Power output: voltage: 5V-20V current 3A-5A power: 15W-100W

Product size: 12.7Cm long, 3Cm wide, 1Cm thick

Product material: high-end aluminum-magnesium alloy material

Product packaging: exquisite carton + blister inner support Package size 16cm * 7.5cm * 1.6cm
